description: Bot difficulty settings for deterministic strength control. Changes to this file should be documented in the changelog.

changes: Defined 5 difficulty tiers: beginner, intermediate, advanced, master, boss
Settings based on Stockfish multi-threading, hash tables, and move time

beginner.description: Very weak play with many candidate moves to choose from, enabling frequent mistakes

intermediate.description: Moderate strength with reasonable think time and good candidate variety

advanced.description: Strong play with focused candidate selection and longer analysis

master.description: Near-optimal play with deep analysis and minimal candidate variance

boss.description: Maximum strength for boss encounters (Marco). Very deep analysis, minimal mistakes

special.description: Custom settings for special event or unique behavior bots (Buddy, Jakie)

notes: Higher multiPV = more candidate moves = more variance = weaker effective play
Lower moveTime = less calculation = weaker play
Threads and hash affect calculation depth within the time limit
Boss tier uses 10s think time for truly challenging endgame encounters
